quicksight.template.piechartvisual.CfnAb:
A pie or donut chart.

The `PieChartVisual` structure describes a visual that is a member of the pie chart family.

The following charts can be described by using this structure:
+ Pie charts
+ Donut charts

For more information, see [Using pie charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/pie-chart.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

For more information, see [Using donut charts](https://docs.aws.amazon.com/quicksight/latest/user/donut-chart.html) in the *Amazon QuickSight User Guide*.

quicksight.template.piechartvisual.Actio.Description: The list of custom actions that are configured for a visual.

quicksight.template.piechartvisual.Chart.Description: The configuration of a pie chart.

quicksight.template.piechartvisual.Colum.Description: The column hierarchy that is used during drill-downs and drill-ups.

quicksight.template.piechartvisual.Subti.Description: The subtitle that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.template.piechartvisual.Title.Description: The title that is displayed on the visual.

quicksight.template.piechartvisual.Visua.Description: The unique identifier of a visual. This identifier must be unique within the context of a dashboard, template, or analysis. Two dashboards, analyses, or templates can have visuals with the same identifiers.
